member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController
member.summary: Extends the WebAPI API controller class. I found I was writing the same stuff over and over again for all my controllers, so this is a collection of all the functionality I've needed. Logging is included automatically, as well as first-chance exception catch and log. This way the exception is logged at the point closest to the database if (and when) it occurs.

member.name: P:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.Connection
member.summary: The connection string for use with the SQL calls below.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadClientResult(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is not expected to be paged. MetaData (for ExtJS) is automatically generated from the result set.
member.param: Stored Procedure to be run
type of DB to connect to
Arguments to pass

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadClientResult(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is not expected to be paged. MetaData (for ExtJS) is automatically generated from the result set.
member.param: Stored Procedure to be run
type of DB to connect to
Arguments to pass

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadClientNullableResult(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is not expected to be paged. MetaData (for ExtJS) is automatically generated from the result set.
member.param: Stored Procedure to be run
type of DB to connect to
Arguments to pass

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadClientNullableResult(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is not expected to be paged. MetaData (for ExtJS) is automatically generated from the result set.
member.param: Stored Procedure to be run
type of DB to connect to
Arguments to pass

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadClientNullableResult(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,System.Boolean,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is not expected to be paged. MetaData (for ExtJS) is automatically generated from the result set.
member.param: Stored Procedure to be run
type of DB to connect to
Arguments to pass

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadPagedClientResult(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is expected to be paged, so a TotalRow (The last row in the data set) is expected. This row will be filtered out of the Data array and added to it's own DataTotal array. Aside from paging and total row count, you can also add per-page or data total values to this row.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadPagedClientResult(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. The result is expected to be paged, so a TotalRow (The last row in the data set) is expected. This row will be filtered out of the Data array and added to it's own DataTotal array. Aside from paging and total row count, you can also add per-page or data total values to this row.
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadResult(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. Returns a list of dynamically created classes with properties for each column in the result set.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadResult(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. Returns a list of dynamically created classes with properties for each column in the result set.
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadResult``1(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. Returns a list of dynamically created classes that extends the given type T (and so T MUST be a public type) with properties for each column in the result set. Items defined in T will be left alone; extra values will be stuck in the extension of T. So if you defined Thing{ int Item; }, this would return Thing1 : Thing { int id; }

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadResult``1(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure with the given arguments. Returns a list of dynamically created classes that extends the given type T (and so T MUST be a public type) with properties for each column in the result set. Items defined in T will be left alone; extra values will be stuck in the extension of T. So if you defined Thing{ int Item; }, this would return Thing1 : Thing { int id; }
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadSingle(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Load a single item from the given stored procedure. If the result set is actually an array, then only the first item is returned.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadSingle(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Load a single item from the given stored procedure. If the result set is actually an array, then only the first item is returned.
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadSingle``1(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Load a single item from the given stored procedure. If the result set is actually an array, then only the first item is returned. Result class will extend T, and so T MUST be public.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.LoadSingle``1(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Load a single item from the given stored procedure. If the result set is actually an array, then only the first item is returned. Result class will extend T, and so T MUST be public.
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.Execute(System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute the given stored procedure; no result is expected.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.Execute(System.String,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Execute the given stored procedure; no result is expected.
member.param: type of DB to connect to

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.Sanitize(System.Data.DataTable,BIACore.Web.Controller.BaseController.DBType)
member.summary: Clean the resulting table of any columns the user is not allowed to see.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Controller.MyReportsController.Download(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: BIACore.Web.Controller.Download(int?) method for downloading MyReports files.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Model.ExtJS.MetaData
member.summary: ExtJS supports automatically creating models with a 'metadata' attribute on result sets. This facilitates the 'metadata' transfer - And if you use BaseController, it's automatically added (which means not defining models 18 times!)

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Model.ExtJS.Parameter
member.summary: Base class for an ExtJS store based data request. Automatically handles 'sort' and 'paging'. Need to add 'filter' and 'grouping' at some point.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Model.ExtJS.Sorter
member.summary: Class for handling the 'sort' parameters on store posts.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Model.ExtJS.StoreResult`1
member.summary: Defines the ExtJS store based result set. Automatically includes metaData/data/total/dataTotal/success properties. Meant to be used with the 'webapi' proxy type.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.MediaFormatter.JsonpFormatter
P:BIACore.Web.MediaFormatter.JsonpFormatter.JsonpParameterName
member.summary: Name of the query string parameter to look for the jsonp function name

member.name: F:BIACore.Web.MediaFormatter.JsonpFormatter.JsonpCallbackFunction
member.summary: Captured name of the Jsonp function that the JSON call is wrapped in. Set in GetPerRequestFormatter Instance

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.MediaFormatter.JsonpFormatter.GetPerRequestFormatterInstance(System.Type,System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue)
member.summary: Override this method to capture the Request object

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.MediaFormatter.JsonpFormatter.GetJsonCallbackFunction(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage)
member.summary: Retrieves the Jsonp Callback function from the query string
